description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_job that runs the following Windows commands in order: set MSBUILDDISABLENODEREUSE=1, echo Restoring NuGet Packages..., "c:
uget
uget.exe" restore "Queste.sln", echo NuGet Packages restored, echo Release build..., "C:\Program Files (x86)\MSBuild\14.0\Bin\msbuild.exe" /consoleloggerparameters:ErrorsOnly /maxcpucount /nologo /property:Configuration=Release /verbosity:quiet /m:4 /nr:false "Queste.sln", echo Build completed, echo Cleaning up.., DEL /Q ".", echo Tests cleaned. In the test stage add a test_job that repeats the restore and build commands, then runs the test suite with "C:\xunit\xunit.console.exe" ".\Queste.Test in\Release\Queste.Test.dll", echoes test completion, and performs the same cleanup steps. In the deploy stage add a deploy_job that runs only on the master branch (and on_success), repeats the restore and build steps, then packs the NuGet package using "c:
uget
uget.exe" pack "Queste.csproj" -Prop Configuration=Release, pushes it to https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package with "c:
uget
uget.exe" push Queste.*.nupkg -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package, and finally cleans up. No Docker image, services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
